text: Upon entering this modern, glass-walled space, I am immediately enveloped by a sense of thoughtful design and intellectual curiosity. The vibrant R+D exhibit catches my gaze, inviting contemplation about the nature of research, development, and human connection with technology. I feel intrigued yet a little distant—as if I am both participant and observer, surrounded by signs of innovation but also confronting the cool sterility of the environment. My thoughts become reflective, pondering how the mind seeks logic and meaning amidst unfamiliar territory. There is a subtle excitement in being present where ideas are explored, but also the faint trace of longing for deeper human warmth among all this calculated order.
